# Christopher Estep

> Personal site of Christopher Estep — founder of Turblu, supply chain leader at Signet Jewelers, and founder of Palmetto Auto Club. Based in Venice Beach, California.

## About

Christopher Estep is a founder and operator whose career runs from healthcare operations to enterprise supply chain to venture building:

- **Early career (Aiken, South Carolina):** At eighteen, ran the Patient Advocate process for the Emergency Department at Aiken Regional Medical Centers.
- **Signet Jewelers:** Supply chain leadership at the world's largest diamond jewelry retailer. Led enterprise initiatives spanning cost savings and acquisitions, including halving transit loss — worth millions of dollars in annual savings.
- **Palmetto Auto Club (founded 2021):** A philanthropic community for East Coast car enthusiasts — premium rallies, curated events, and charitable fundraising.
- **Turblu (current):** Founder & CEO. Moved to Venice Beach, California to build Turblu at the intersection of motorsports and technology.

## Links

- [Website](https://estepchristopher.com): This site — story, current work, and contact.
- [Turblu](https://www.turblu.com): Christopher's current company.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/christopher-estep-8b736312a/): Professional profile.
